{{基礎情報 公家
| 氏名 = Kanesune-no-Mikoto
| 画像 =
| 画像サイズ =
| 画像説明 =
| 時代 = {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}}
| 生誕 = Unknown
| 死没 = Unknown
| 改名 =
| 別名 = By one theory, identified with {{ill|Nomi-no-Sukune|ja|野見宿禰}}
| 諡号 =
| 神号 =
| 戒名 =
| 墓所 =
| 官位 = Izumo no Kuni no Miyatsuko
| 主君 =
| 氏族 = {{ill|Izumo clan|ja|出雲氏}}
| 父母 = Father: {{ill|Ugatsukunu-no-Mikoto|ja|宇迦都久怒命}}
| 兄弟 = {{ill|Hiwa-no-Mimi-no-Mikoto|ja|比和耳命}}
| 妻   =
| 子   = {{ill|Kunihitanio-no-Mikoto|ja|来日田維穂命}}<br />{{ill|Mishima-tarinuno-Mikoto|ja|三島足奴命}}<br />{{ill|Kushimaro-Tarine-no-Mikoto|ja|櫛万呂足尼命}}<br />{{ill|Otona-kushihime-no-Mikoto|ja|乙名久志媛命}}<br />{{ill|Kitashiko-no-Mikoto|ja|岐多志古命}}
| 特記事項 =
}}
'''Kanesune-no-Mikoto''' (''kanesune-no-mikoto'') was a {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代}} {{ill|gōzoku|ja|豪族}} and one of the {{ill|Izumo no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|出雲国造}}.

== Overview ==
Following his father Ugatsukunu-no-Mikoto, the first kuni no miyatsuko, he became the second-generation {{ill|kuni no miyatsuko|ja|国造}}. One theory identifies him with Nomi-no-Sukune<ref>{{ill|Senke Takenushi|ja|千家武主}}, ''Izumo Kokuzō Dentō Ryaku'', 1882.</ref>, but the two are different people entirely with different parents and brothers, and that source is a singular and unusual document.

== Footnotes ==
{{Reflist}}

== References ==
*{{Cite book|和書 |title=出雲国造系統伝略 |date=1898年7月 |publisher=北島斉孝 |author=[[北島斉孝]] 編 |doi=10.11501/777444}}
*{{Cite book|和書 |title=出雲國造傳統略 |date=1882年4月 |publisher=千家武主 |author=千家武主 謹編 |ncid=BA55648765}}
*{{Cite book|和書 |title=古代氏族系譜集成 |date=1986年4月 |publisher=古代氏族研究会 |author=[[宝賀寿男]] 編著|ncid=BN00924708}}
*{{Cite book|和書 |title=古代氏族の研究⑯ 出雲氏・土師氏─原出雲王国の盛衰 |date=2020年8月 |publisher=青垣出版 |author=宝賀寿男 |isbn=978-4-434-27825-9}}

== See also ==
*{{ill|List of Figures from before the Asuka Period|ja|飛鳥時代以前の人物一覧}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:かねすねのみこと}}
[[Category:出雲氏]]
[[Category:古墳時代の人物]]
[[Category:古代日本の人物]]
[[Category:出雲国の人物]]
[[Category:島根県の歴史]]
[[Category:生没年不詳]]
[[Category:Kuni no miyatsuko]]
[[ja:襲髄命]]
